backlog.title: Add Python runtime support to gateway
backlog.description: Extend gateway to support Python functions alongside C/C++
subtasks: Update gateway to recognize python/ sample directory
Add Python functions to benchmark suite

backlog.title: Add HTTP request/response handling for Python
backlog.description: Enable Python functions to parse HTTP requests and generate responses
subtasks: Implement minimal HTTP parser in Python
Add request object to frozen module context
Test with sample HTTP handler function

backlog.title: Optimize Python cold start performance
backlog.description: Profile and optimize MicroPython initialization time
subtasks: Compare with C function cold start

backlog.title: Document Python runtime usage
backlog.description: Add documentation for writing and deploying Python functions

completed_tasks.title: Add stdin/read support and inter-function calls
completed_tasks.description: Functions can now read stdin via IAI_READ hypercall. c/weather_fmt calls python/weather_parser via the gateway as a demo of inter-function communication.
deliverables: iai_common.h: IAI_READ added to enum
host/hypercall.c: IAI_READ handler (read from host fd into payload buffer)
shim/unistd.c+h: read() backed by IAI_READ hypercall
external/python-port/main.c: input() enabled via mp_hal_stdin_rx_chr + mp_iai_readline
external/python-port/mpconfigport.h: MICROPY_PY_BUILTINS_INPUT enabled
gateway/main.go: cmd.Stdin = r.Body, native runtime mode (c/*→process, python/*→python3)
samples/c/weather_fmt.c: fetches open-meteo, POSTs JSON to python/weather_parser, reads port from stdin
samples/python/weather_parser.py: reads JSON via input(), extracts weather fields without slicing (ROM_LEVEL_MINIMUM limitation)
scripts/demo.sh: reduced to 3 gateways (native:8081, kvm:8082, docker:8083)
gateway/static/index.html: c/weather_fmt added to dropdown, PORT_MAP simplified
notes: String slicing (data[i:end]) is broken at ROM_LEVEL_MINIMUM — use character-by-character accumulation instead
mp_store_global fails before module execution — input() via HAL is the correct approach
native runtime auto-selects process/python based on function prefix

completed_tasks.title: Build interactive demo UI
completed_tasks.description: Single-page demo with 3-column runtime comparison, live latency bars, and source code display
deliverables: gateway/static/index.html: 3-column UI (native/kvm/docker), parallel fetch, latency bars, source panel
gateway/main.go: static handler on GET /, CORS headers, /source/* endpoint
scripts/demo.sh: 4 gateways (process:8081, kvm:8082, docker:8083, python:8084)

completed_tasks.title: Add alloc_stress and multi_req sample functions
completed_tasks.description: Added alloc_stress and multi_req in C and Python, benchmarked across all runtimes
deliverables: samples/c/alloc_stress.c: 64 malloc/free blocks, pattern verify, 0 errors
samples/c/multi_req.c: 3 sequential HTTP GETs to api.open-meteo.com (Tokyo, London, NYC)
samples/python/alloc_stress.py: list-based alloc stress (bytearray unavailable at ROM_LEVEL_MINIMUM)
samples/python/multi_req.py: 3 sequential socket requests via modsocket.c
scripts/benchmark.py: net_query removed, alloc_stress and multi_req added to C_SAMPLES and PYTHON_SAMPLES
samples/c/weather.c: fixed hostname open-meteo.com -> api.open-meteo.com (was returning 301)
findings: alloc_stress: hypercall malloc ~5x slower than native (0.146ms vs 0.032ms), sub-ms absolute — negligible
multi_req: KVM execution identical to process (1011ms) — zero hypercall overhead for sustained I/O
Docker Python networking significantly slower for I/O-bound workloads (1450ms vs 1011ms for multi_req)

completed_tasks.title: Extend benchmark to include Python samples
completed_tasks.description: Added Python functions to the benchmark suite across all three runtimes (kvm, python process, docker)
deliverables: samples/python/Dockerfile: python:3.11-slim image with ARG SOURCE
samples/python/Makefile: proc and docker-all targets
gateway: python process runtime support
scripts/benchmark.py: python/hello, python/prime, python/weather added
Benchmark verified: KVM ~19-25ms cold start, beats native python3 process (~41-45ms)

completed_tasks.title: Add missing shim functions for MicroPython compatibility
completed_tasks.description: Implemented all required C library functions for MicroPython runtime
deliverables: stdlib.h/c: realloc, abort, exit, atoi, strtol with __isoc23_strtol alias
stdio.h/c: printf, snprintf, vsnprintf, putchar, putc, fputc with FILE/stdout/stderr
setjmp.h/S: setjmp, longjmp, _setjmp for exception handling
Security hardening: bounds checking, overflow protection, pointer validation
Tests: test_stdlib.c, test_stdio.c, test_setjmp.c - all passing

completed_tasks.title: Add test for string.h functions
completed_tasks.description: Created test_string.c to validate all string.h implementations

completed_tasks.title: Port MicroPython minimal to IaiServerless
completed_tasks.description: MicroPython running as freestanding unikernel linked against shim
deliverables: external/python-port/: mpconfigport.h, main.c, Makefile, modsocket.c
shim/netdb.h: added missing header for gethostbyname/hostent
modsocket.c: socket module registered as 'socket' with standard Python interface
NLR exception handling in main.c with mp_obj_print_exception for error output
MICROPY_ENABLE_EXTERNAL_IMPORT + mp_import_stat/mp_lexer_new_from_file stubs
MICROPY_PY_BUILTINS_STR_OP_MODULO enabled for % string formatting

completed_tasks.title: Add Python sample functions
completed_tasks.description: Sample Python serverless functions built via objcopy embedding
deliverables: samples/python/hello.py: basic hello world with handler()
samples/python/prime.py: prime sieve using integer sqrt (no float)
samples/python/weather.py: live HTTP GET to open-meteo.com API
samples/python/build.sh: embeds .py into MicroPython ELF via objcopy
samples/python/Makefile: builds all .py files, hooked into samples/Makefile

notes: Python code embedded into ELF via objcopy, executed from _binary_code_py_start
socket module backed by shim hypercalls - standard import socket works
Float disabled - use integer arithmetic (isqrt pattern for prime)
str.encode()/decode() unavailable at ROM_LEVEL_MINIMUM - use bytes() and str() constructors
